description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a modern, low-profile design, featuring a dark gabled roof and light-colored exterior walls. The structure includes a prominent attached garage with a wide driveway leading up to it, and a fenced-in yard that surrounds the house on three sides. The front facade is articulated with multiple rooflines and protruding sections, giving the building a dynamic, contemporary appearance. Large windows are distributed across the exterior, providing ample natural light to the interior spaces. The property is bordered by a low, white fence, and the landscaping consists of a well-maintained grassy lawn. The overall layout is spacious, with clear separation between the main living area and the garage wing.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a dark gabled roof, light exterior walls, attached garage, and fenced grassy yard. The design features multiple rooflines, large windows, and a wide driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, attached garage, wide driveway, and fenced yard.
description_view_1: Garage-facing view highlighting the garage doors, driveway, and side yard.
description_view_2: Rear angled view showing the back of the house, fenced yard, and rear windows.
description_view_3: Back view displaying the long rear facade, multiple windows, and the full extent of the fenced yard.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
